# Hooks

| Hook | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| [usePayScheduleForm](use-pay-schedule-form.md) | Form hook for creating or updating a company pay schedule. |
| [useSignCompanyForm](use-sign-company-form.md) | Headless hook for signing a company form — displays the form PDF and collects a typed signature with confirmation checkbox. |
